Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine:
DVPLOG2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; EN ; N U,ANS,CURMENU S U="^",CURMENU="MMAIN"
W !!,"*******************************************" W !,"*******************************************" W !,"LOG MANAGER V 1.0" W !,"*******************************************" W !,"*******************************************",! D DISPMENU(CURMENU) Q ; DISPMENU(MENU) ; W ! N FOUND,IX,GOODANS S IX="",FOUND=0 F IX=1:1:20 S LINE=$T(@MENU+IX) Q:$E(LINE,2,3)=";;" D . S LINE=$E(LINE,3,$L(LINE)),GOODANS(IX)=$P(LINE,U,2,3) . W !,$P(LINE,U) ASK ; W !!,"Select an option: " R ANS S IX="" F S IX=$O(GOODANS(IX)) Q:IX="" D Q:FOUND . I +ANS=$P(GOODANS(IX),U) D @$P(GOODANS(IX),U,2) S FOUND=1 Q G:'FOUND ASK Q ; ;---------------------------------------------- ;MAIN MENU ;---------------------------------------------- MMAIN ; ;1: Search^1^SEARCH ;2: Delete^2^DELETE ;3: Quit^3^QUIT ;; SEARCH ; S CURMENU="MSEARCH" D DISPMENU(CURMENU) Q ; DELETE ; W !,"DELETE" Q QUIT ; W !!,"Bye bye",!! Q ; ;---------------------------------------------- ;SEARCH MENU ;---------------------------------------------- MSEARCH ; ;1: By category^1^SBYCAT ;2: By date^2^SBYDATE ;3: Back^3^SBACK ;; SBYCAT ; Q ; SBYDATE ; D SBYDATE^DVPLOG3 Q ; SBACK ; S CURMENU="MMAIN" D DISPMENU(CURMENU) Q ; ;---------------------------------------------- ;EXPAND MENU ;---------------------------------------------- MEXPAND ; ;1: XML request^1^XREQ ;2: JSON response^2^XRES ;3: GLOBAL data^3^XGLOBAL ;4: Back^4^XBACK ;; XREQ ; W !!,"---------------------------------------------------------" W !," XML" W !,"---------------------------------------------------------" N IX S IX="" F S IX=$O(@SUB@("XML",IX)) Q:IX="" D . W !,@SUB@("XML",IX) G XMENU^DVPLOG3 XRES ; W !!,"---------------------------------------------------------" W !," JSON RESPONSE" W !,"---------------------------------------------------------" N IX S IX="" F S IX=$O(@SUB@("DATA",IX)) Q:IX="" D . W !,@SUB@("DATA",IX) G XMENU^DVPLOG3 XGLOBAL ; W !!,"---------------------------------------------------------" W !," GLOBALS" W !,"---------------------------------------------------------" ZW @SUB@("GLBL") G XMENU^DVPLOG3 XBACK ; S CURMENU="MSEARCH" D DISPMENU(CURMENU) Q
